creator: chriskl@familyhealth.com.au
text:
In the porter's handbook, it is documented how to automatically generate a basic pkg-plist.  The method described is fantastic and works well, however why not just do it as a make target?  That way I can prepare my port and then go 'make pkg-plist' and it will generate the plist.

After generation, it can issue warnings like 'Now, make any changes, remove user conf files, remove man pages, etc.'
